recorded_by: dest1_alm P1 serve blocker close session
short_title: serve_alm_native.hexa never binds because imported vr_*/hr_* functions are undefined at runtime
initial_symptom_reported: `use "voice_routes"` module loader stalls 20s+ without listen bind
actual_symptom_on_investigation: Smoke test fails 3/8 (T3/T6/T7) with 'Runtime error: undefined function: vr_extract_string, vr_extract_int, vr_json_escape, hr_presets_extended, hr_personas, hr_capabilities_json'. main() returns early at serve_alm_native.hexa:800 (`if rc > 0 { return }`) BEFORE reaching net_listen. No 20s stall — full run took 10.94s (3.70s without imports, 7s is just the redundant parse of voice_routes + hire_routes).

root_cause.summary: stage0 interpreter treats `use "path"` as a runtime no-op — imported functions NEVER land in env_fns.
root_cause.evidence_snippet: if k == "Use" || k == "UseStmt" || k == "ImportStmt" { return val_void() }
root_cause.design_context: Proper flow requires flatten_imports preprocessor (self/module_loader.hexa) to inline all transitively-used files into a single flattened source BEFORE `hexa run`. Running `hexa run` directly on a file with `use` statements silently drops the imports. http_server.hexa and others in serving/ have the same latent bug but fail at parse (pre-existing `Handle` token regression at line 92), masking the use-resolution gap.

diagnosis_steps: `hexa parse serving/voice_routes.hexa` → 0.09s OK (not a parse stall)
`/usr/bin/time hexa run serving/serve_alm_native.hexa` → 10.94s with use / 3.70s without — 7s delta is redundant parse only, not a hang
Runtime logs show `Runtime error: undefined function: vr_*` at every call site → confirms use is no-op
Grep `use` handler in hexa_full.hexa → returns val_void() immediately
Check module_loader.hexa → CLI-driven preprocessor, not wired into `hexa run`

fix_applied.commit_message: fix(serve): stage0 use-is-noop — inline JSON helpers, stub /voice/* /hire/* to 501
changes: Removed `use "voice_routes"` and `use "hire_routes"` (no-op; skipped the 7s dead parse).
Inlined `san_json_escape`, `san_extract_string`, `san_extract_int`, `san_is_digit` — byte-only ASCII JSON helpers (verbatim ports of vr_* trio at voice_routes.hexa:856/877/916).
Replaced 4 call sites (san_persona_json, san_parse_persona_req, san_route /generate, 404 handler) with san_* equivalents.

Stubbed /voice/health, /voice/profiles, /voice/tts, /voice/e2e, /hire/capabilities to status=501 with body `{"error":"...pending module_loader integration","see":"<path>"}` — re-enable flag stored inline with file:line pointers.
T7 smoke test expectation flipped from 200 to 501 (pending-state guard).
Added explanatory comment block in Section 6 documenting the stage0 use-is-noop root cause so future readers understand the inlined copies.

verification.startup_time_after_fix: 3.8s parse + ~2s smoke, bind within 6s of launch
verification.curl_post_alm_persona: 200 OK {text, phi_vec:{16 dims}, laws_pass:true, violations:[], weight_origin, gen_ms, backend:hexa-native-stub} — AN11 schema compliant
verification.bind_proof: lsof -nP -iTCP:8090 -sTCP:LISTEN reported: hexa_stag PID ... IPv4 ... TCP *:8090 (LISTEN)

before_fix: git checkout 4babe794~ -- serving/serve_alm_native.hexa  # revert to pre-inline state
hexa run serving/serve_alm_native.hexa   # observe: 3 undefined-function errors, 5/8 smoke, main returns before listen, port 8090 stays free
after_fix: curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8090/alm/persona -d '{"persona":"smoke","prompt":"hi"}'   # 200 OK with AN11 JSON

affected_versions.hexa_full_hexa_commit_context: self/hexa_full.hexa @ 8256 use-is-noop — present in all stage0 builds 2026-04-13 onwards
affected_versions.anima_commits_with_latent_bug: any serve_alm_native.hexa with `use` directives prior to 4babe794 / this session's fix commit

followup_tickets.goal: Integrate self/module_loader.hexa flatten step into `hexa run` (or add a `hexa run --flatten` subcommand) so `use "x"` actually links functions.
followup_tickets.unblocks: re-enable /voice/* and /hire/* routes in serve_alm_native.hexa by reverting the 501 stubs — file:line pointers are preserved in the stubs' own comments.
followup_tickets.acceptance: serving/voice_routes.hexa:1373 vr_health_json and serving/hire_routes.hexa:842 hr_capabilities_json callable from serve_alm_native.hexa without inlining.

constraints_respected.AN11: weight_emergent + phi_vec[16] + laws_pass + weight_origin — verified via curl
constraints_respected.feedback_troubleshoot_comments: inline comment in serve_alm_native.hexa Section 6 explains root cause + fix

also_observed_not_fixed: serving/http_server.hexa:92 Parse error at col 22: expected RParen, got Handle ('handle') — unrelated pre-existing parser regression, out of dest1_alm P1 scope.
